sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43742" key="eu)ekpoi/htos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐεκ-ποίητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43742.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easy to turn to account</tr_>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">assimilate</tr_>, of food, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Med.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:1:2:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.2.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
